ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cookies" (
  "cookie_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cookie */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the cookie */,
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* ID of the provider */,
  "purpose_id" INTEGER /* ID of the purpose */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the type */,
  "valid_until" TEXT /* Expiry date or duration of the cookie */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the cookie */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the cookie was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the cookie was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cookie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cookies_provider_id FOREIGN KEY ("provider_id") REFERENCES providers ("provider_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cookies_purpose_id FOREIGN KEY ("purpose_id") REFERENCES purposes ("purpose_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cookies_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "providers" (
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each provider */,
  "provider_name" TEXT /* Name of the provider */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the provider */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the provider */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email of the provider */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "purposes" (
  "purpose_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each purpose */,
  "purpose_name" TEXT /* Name of the purpose */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the purpose */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the purpose */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("purpose_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the type */,
  "protocol" TEXT /* Protocol used by the type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, data analyst, developer) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Password hash of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cookie_user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "cookie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cookie being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the cookie */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the cookie was accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time when the cookie was accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cookie_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cookie_user_access_cookie_id FOREIGN KEY ("cookie_id") REFERENCES cookies ("cookie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cookie_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "cookie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cookie being versioned */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the cookie */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date when the cookie was updated */,
  "update_description" TEXT /* Description of the update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cookie_versions_cookie_id FOREIGN KEY ("cookie_id") REFERENCES cookies ("cookie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "provider_cookies" (
  "provider_cookie_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each provider-cookie pair */,
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* ID of the provider */,
  "cookie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cookie */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("provider_cookie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_provider_cookies_provider_id FOREIGN KEY ("provider_id") REFERENCES providers ("provider_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_provider_cookies_cookie_id FOREIGN KEY ("cookie_id") REFERENCES cookies ("cookie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cookie_purposes" (
  "cookie_purpose_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cookie-purpose pair */,
  "cookie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cookie */,
  "purpose_id" INTEGER /* ID of the purpose */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cookie_purpose_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cookie_purposes_purpose_id FOREIGN KEY ("purpose_id") REFERENCES purposes ("purpose_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cookie_purposes_cookie_id FOREIGN KEY ("cookie_id") REFERENCES cookies ("cookie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cookie_types" (
  "cookie_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cookie-type pair */,
  "cookie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cookie */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cookie_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cookie_types_cookie_id FOREIGN KEY ("cookie_id") REFERENCES cookies ("cookie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cookie_types_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "integrations" (
  "integration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each integration */,
  "cookie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cookie being integrated */,
  "system_name" TEXT /* Name of the system being integrated with */,
  "system_url" TEXT /* URL of the system being integrated with */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("integration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_integrations_cookie_id FOREIGN KEY ("cookie_id") REFERENCES cookies ("cookie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "session_start" TEXT /* Timestamp when the session started */,
  "session_end" TEXT /* Timestamp when the session ended */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "cookie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cookie being changed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_cookie_id FOREIGN KEY ("cookie_id") REFERENCES cookies ("cookie_id")
)
